samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Serial-to-Parallel Conversion Circuit</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data (8 bits wide).</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Sequential logic block triggered on the positive edge of clk
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                // Asynchronous reset
                cnt <= 4'd0;
                dout_parallel <= 8'd0;
                dout_valid <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                // Check if din_valid is asserted
                if (din_valid) begin
                    // Shift the incoming serial data into dout_parallel
                    dout_parallel[cnt] <= din_serial;
                    
                    // Increment the counter
                    cnt <= cnt + 1;
                    
                    // Check if 8 bits have been received
                    if (cnt == 4'd7) begin
                        // Set dout_valid to indicate valid output data
                        dout_valid <= 1'b1;
                        
                        // Reset the counter after processing 8 bits
                        cnt <= 4'd0;
                    end else begin
                        // Set dout_valid to indicate invalid output data
                        dout_valid <= 1'b0;
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
